TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Ruba' ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Gpho go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 77 buwan, 220 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 97% kyan ku 213 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 3% kyan ku 7 hi nya. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Ruba' hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Ruba' hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Ruba' hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Ruba' hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Ruba' hya' ga Kukung. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ruβaʔ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku s~ɕinʦ~ʨik keŋ atu ɣpħo ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ruβaʔ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na ruβaʔ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ruβaʔ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ruβaʔ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na ruβaʔ ħjaʔ ɣa kukuŋ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Ruba' ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Gpho go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 77 buwan, 220 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 97% kyan ku 213 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 3% kyan ku 7 hi nya. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Ruba' hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Ruba' hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Ruba' hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Ruba' hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Ruba' hya' ga Kukung. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ruβaʔ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku s~ɕinʦ~ʨik keŋ atu ɣpħo ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ruβaʔ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na ruβaʔ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ruβaʔ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ruβaʔ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na ruβaʔ ħjaʔ ɣa kukuŋ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
